section.title: appliesTo
section.para: Indicates the element or attribute to which the content of a <change> applies.

Value description: Text. The name of an XLIFF Core element or attribute (for example target), or the QName-qualified name of an attribute from another namespace (for example its:locQualityRatingScore).
section.programlisting: <unit id="1" its:locQualityRatingScore="0.968"> <pvn:provenance> <pvn:change agent="TAUS MTQE" appliesTo="its:locQualityRatingScore"/> </pvn:provenance> <segment> <source>Your annual tax certificate is now available for download.</source> <target>O seu certificado anual de impostos está dispoñible para descarga.</target> </segment> </unit>
